zh.lifeSummary: Oddone Del Vasto是Anselmo de Liguria Marchese di Tortona和Adelasia Obertenghi De Este的兒子，出生在義大利阿布盧左迪瓦斯托。他和Berta di Turino至少有4個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於大約1084年。

nameMeanings.name: Del
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French (Lorraine): variant of the habitational name Delle 2 or a masculine form of a homonymous topographic name. — Note: In the population figure published by the US Census Bureau, the Spanish or Italian preposition with fused definite article del ‘of the’, which forms first part of surnames such as Del Cid and Del Signore , has apparently been in some instances counted as an independent surname.

variants.name: Delle
meanings: German: habitational name from a place so named in North Rhine-Westphalia or a topographic name (see   Dell  ).

French (Lorraine): habitational name from Delle, a place in Territoire de Belfort. Alternatively, a topographic name, with fused preposition d(e) ‘from’, for someone who lived near a prominent alder tree or trees, from elle, a derivative of Middle High German erle ‘alder’.

nameMeanings.name: Vasto
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Carlos, Jose, Reynaldo, Alejandro, Andres, Carlito, Humberto, Jaime, Javier, Lilia, Luiz, Luz.  Portuguese Guilherme.
Portuguese and Galician: habitational name from any of the places called Basto in Portugal, from basto ‘dense (wood)’. This surname is also found in southwestern Spain.

en.lifeSummary: Oddone Del Vasto was born in Vasto, Chieti, Abruzzo, Italy as the son of Anselmo de Liguria Marchese di Tortona and Adelasia Obertenghi De Este. He had at least 4 sons and 1 daughter with Berta di Turino. He died about 1084.

fr.lifeSummary: Oddone Del Vasto est né à Vasto, Chieti, Abruzzo, Italie, fils de Anselmo de Liguria Marchese di Tortona et Adelasia Obertenghi De Este. Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille avec Berta di Turino. Il est décédé environ 1084.

de.lifeSummary: Oddone Del Vasto wurde in Vasto, Chieti, Abruzzo, Italien, als Sohn von Anselmo de Liguria Marchese di Tortona und Adelasia Obertenghi De Este geboren. Er hatte mit Berta di Turino mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1084.

it.lifeSummary: Oddone Del Vasto è nato il nel Vasto, Chieti, Abruzzo, Italia come figlio di Anselmo de Liguria Marchese di Tortona e Adelasia Obertenghi De Este. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia con Berta di Turino. Morì circa 1084.

ja.lifeSummary: Oddone Del VastoはイタリアアブルズゾチエティヴァストーでAnselmo de Liguria Marchese di TortonaとAdelasia Obertenghi De Esteの息子として生まれた。彼はBerta di Turinoとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は約1084年に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Oddone Del Vasto(은)는 이탈리아 아브루즈오 치티 바스토에서 Anselmo de Liguria Marchese di Tortona(와)과 Adelasia Obertenghi De Este의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Berta di Turino(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1084년 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Oddone Del Vasto nasceu em Vasto, Chieti, Abruzzo, Itália filho de Anselmo de Liguria Marchese di Tortona e Adelasia Obertenghi De Este. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha com Berta di Turino. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1084.

ru.lifeSummary: Oddone Del Vasto родился в местности васто, чиети, абруззо, Италия. Его родителей звали Anselmo de Liguria Marchese di Tortona и Adelasia Obertenghi De Este. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь от Berta di Turino. Он умер около 1084 г.

es.lifeSummary: Oddone Del Vasto nació en Vasto, Chieti, Abruzzo, Italia como hijo de Anselmo de Liguria Marchese di Tortona y Adelasia Obertenghi De Este. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija con Berta di Turino. Murió aproximadamente 1084.
